description_long: This is a tall, modern office building with a distinctive stepped profile, featuring two main vertical sections of differing heights. The facade is clad in a light beige or tan material with a regular grid of dark lines, suggesting a curtain wall system with large, evenly spaced windows. The base of the building is slightly recessed and surrounded by a darker, textured material, possibly stone or concrete, and includes landscaped or paved areas. The roofline is flat with some visible mechanical structures or rooftop installations. The building's overall form is sleek and rectilinear, with gentle curves at the corners and a prominent vertical emphasis. The entrance area appears to be set back and integrated into the base, likely providing access to a spacious lobby.
description: A tall, modern office building with a stepped profile, light grid-patterned facade, and a recessed, darker base. The structure features large windows and a flat roof with visible rooftop elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stepped profile, main entrance area, and the grid-patterned facade with two vertical sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, curved corners, and the continuous grid window pattern.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the taller section's prominence and the base's darker material wrapping around.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the stepped transition between the two main vertical sections and the flat roof.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular vertical and horizontal grid of large rectangular windows, evenly spaced across all facades.
